option_line: arroyo_askAboutZGR3c:"So her plan was to get those mercs killed?"
original: So her plan was to get those mercs killed?
translated: Donc son plan était de faire tuer ces mercenaires ?

option_line: arroyo_askAboutZGR3d:"Surely you can use this against her."
original: Surely you can use this against her.
translated: Vous pouvez surement utiliser ça contre elle.

option_line: arroyo_askAboutZGR3b:"So her plan is to get me killed?"
original: So her plan is to get me killed?
translated: Donc son plan est de me faire tuer ?

original:
He gives you a look.

"Don't even start."
translated:
Il vous lance un regard.

"Ne commencez même pas."

original:
"Probably not." He gives you a look.

"But she'll use your death if she finds a way to make it useful. And she will."
translated:
"Probablement pas." Il vous lance un regard.

"Mais elle exploitera votre mort si elle trouve un moyen de la rendre utile. Et elle le fera."

original:
"Probably not." He gives you a look.

"But she'll use their death if she finds a way to make it useful to her. And she will."
translated:
"Probablement pas." Il vous lance un regard.

"Mais elle exploitera leur mort si elle trouve un moyen de la rendre utile. Et elle le fera."

original:
He gives you a look.

"We'll see."
translated:
Il vous lance un regard.

"On verra."

original:
"My advice is, if you get involved? Watch your back. Mind yourself. Don't trust her."

He looks away, thinking. His hands held together in front of his mouth, not quite the form of Luddic prayer.

"Seen a few fleet operators fall right off the map. She's looking for something. Big risk. I'd bet if I knew what it was I'd say it wasn't worth it."
translated:
"Mon conseil, si vous vous impliquez ? Surveillez vos arrières. Faites attention a vous. Ne lui faites pas confiance."

Il détourné le regard, pensif. Les mains jointes devant sa bouche, pas tout a fait dans la posture de la prière Luddique.

"J'ai vu quelques operateurs de flotte disparaitre de la circulation. Elle cherche quelque chose. Gros risques. Je parie que si je savais quoi, je dirais que ça n'en vaut pas la peine."
Merci pour votre mise en garde.

option_line: arroyo_askAboutZGR5c:"She wants me to find something called the 'Threat'."
original: She wants me to find something called the 'Threat'.
translated: Elle veut que je trouve quelque chose appele la 'Menace'.
